title: Better Music Disc and Covers
description: Adds animated jukebox visuals and custom music discs with unique album-style textures and completely new soundtracks, bringing a fresh audio-visual experience to Minecraft.
body:
**This resource pack enhances Minecraft’s music experience by adding fully custom music discs, animated jukebox textures, and album-style vinyl artwork. Every disc is redesigned to look like a real vinyl record with a matching cover, and each one plays a completely new custom soundtrack.**

**Requires the [Jukebox Custom Disc Fix](https://modrinth.com/mod/jukebox-custom-disc-fix) mod. Without it, music discs may stop playing unexpectedly.**

## Features

- **Animated Jukebox Model:**
The jukebox now includes a spinning vinyl record with smooth animation for a more immersive look.

- **Custom Music Discs:**
Adds new discs with unique songs replacing the default tracks. Each track is professionally normalized so they blend naturally into Minecraft’s audio environment.

- **Album-Style Covers:**
Every disc includes a redesigned texture inspired by real album artwork, matching the custom music it plays.

- **Vanilla-friendly Styling:**
All textures are designed to fit Minecraft’s art style without breaking immersion.


### Why Use This Pack?

If you want your jukebox to look and sound more alive, this pack transforms the vanilla experience with fresh visuals and new music. Perfect for survival worlds, adventure maps, or servers that want unique atmosphere and personality.

**Compatibility**

Designed for Minecraft 1.20+

Works in both singleplayer and multiplayer

Compatible with most mods that do not overwrite jukebox or music disc models/sounds

Notes

This pack replaces certain disc sound files to add custom music.
